//: REFERENCE copy of every setting with its default value.
//clientId: Your Discord Application ID (digits only). Or bake a shared default into src/config.js (DEFAULT_CLIENT_ID) so users need zero setup. Run `claude-presence setup` for a guided flow.
//detection: How and how often Claude is detected.
//behaviour: 'clear' keeps the helper alive and hides presence on close; 'exit' shuts it down.
//model: Which model to show. The app doesn't expose this reliably, so 'label' is the dependable source; 'detect' is best-effort and may be blank.
//usage: The desktop app is a flat subscription (no per-message $), so we show your plan name + real local time instead of a misleading dollar figure.
//presence: How the status looks. Image values are EITHER an asset key uploaded to your app OR a full https URL to a PNG/JPG (no upload needed).
